title: Ȓ
summary: Ȓ (or ȓ) is a letter used in the Iñupiaq language and discussion of Serbo-Croatian and Slovene phonology and poetics. Its form is derived from the Latin letter R (R r) by an addition of an inverted breve.
text:
Ȓ (or ȓ) is a letter used in the Iñupiaq language and discussion of Serbo-Croatian and Slovene phonology and poetics. Its form is derived from the Latin letter R (R r) by an addition of an inverted breve.
